Batch files are stored under a wave/alloc/batch path hierarchy

No explicit ordering, relationships, or selection rationale within the file

notes: This batch inventories six claude-ds design-system files—four token CSS sheets, one HTML explainer, and one tonal-zoning CSS file—without symbols or relationships.
